animation-0.--0hb-background-image: radial-gradient( ellipse at center, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 80% )

animation-2.--2h-background-image: radial-gradient(circle, var(--2h-background-color-shared) 0.2em, transparent 0.3em), radial-gradient(circle, var(--2h-background-color-shared) 0.2em, transparent 0.3em)
